task.title: Connect to Zscaler
task.shortdesc: Use these steps to connect Zscaler if your organization requires it for secure access to company resources.

context.p: Some organizations use Zscaler to provide secure access to company applications and network resources. Depending on your setup, Zscaler may connect automatically.

step.cmd: Open the Zscaler application if it does not open automatically.
Sign in with your company account.
Confirm that Zscaler shows a connected or active status.

postreq.note: Some company applications and network resources may not be available until Zscaler is connected.

result.p: Zscaler is connected and secure access to required company resources is available.
